canonical_core.requested_outcome: Complete #892 Tier 6 final Python completion promotion after exact source-symbol runtime boundary proof.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.

canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Python is promoted only when generated/<package>/python is the only shipped Python executable projection, command-generation has no package-specific runtime behavior, package source has no parser/help/dispatch/executable CLI ownership, every generated operation is portable-codegen-primitive-executed or an explicit accepted package-domain primitive with non-portability proof, no Tier 2 primitive hides generic deterministic behavior, and source/installed/Docker conformance pass.
